variants: Xiaorui Luo has established herself as a leading expert in communication disorders. She earned her doctorate under the mentorship of Yamir Rabasa, who guided her academic pursuits. As a testament to her expertise, she holds the Ultrafine Scribe Badge, showcasing her commitment to the field. Her research contributions have been published in the Tidepool Shard Review, reflecting her significant impact in the discipline. Moreover, the Prairie Lantern Squad serves as her primary funding source, supporting her ongoing projects and exploration in communication disorders.
